cards.name: Demo-Day Intern
cards.concept: Eager glass-chrome hype-bot on a demo stage holding a glowing v1.0 benchmark sign under a spotlight snap. Sharp ascending body, glass torso shows a green benchmark bar. Glass cannon.

cards.name: Vaporware Teaser
cards.concept: Keynote stage: a giant floating COMING SOON slide, a silhouetted presenter gesturing at an empty pedestal where the product is just a wisp of mint vapor. Announce = hype arrow.

cards.name: Hype-4 Omni
cards.concept: Taller hype-bot mid-launch firing a hype-ping bolt off-frame; four ascending benchmark chevrons, OMNI etched, +1 number pop.

cards.name: Closed Beta Brigade
cards.concept: Squad of sleek stealth hype-bots in formation; front one sharp, the rest ghosted/translucent (Stealth Mode). BETA badges.

cards.name: Move Fast, Break Prod
cards.concept: A glass server tower fracturing as a DEPLOY button is slammed; coral-red error sparks fly out three ways (3 dmg split). Move fast, break things.

cards.name: Series-F Frenzy
cards.concept: A funding-round frenzy — a hype-bot raining glowing 'F' funding chips over a row of smaller bots, all getting hype arrows.

cards.name: Surprise Keynote
cards.concept: 'One more thing' — a presenter whips a sheet off a hidden glass model under a blinding launch beam (Launch Day).

cards.name: Pivot to Hardware
cards.concept: A glossy launch device/cannon being bolted to the CEO podium; chrome, sharp, 3-Attack Launch weapon.

cards.name: Founder Mode Sam
cards.concept: Legendary founder caricature mid-keynote, halo of slide light, gesturing 'one more thing'; gold rarity trim, team hype radiating.

cards.name: Total Addressable Market
cards.concept: An enormous market-cap arrow/pie chart firing as a beam straight at an off-frame CEO, ignoring walls. Legendary gold.

cards.name: Paperclip Auditor
cards.concept: Earnest padded rabbit clutching a clipboard, standing behind a small foam guardrail wall. Rounded, defensive, calm.

cards.name: Red-Team Rabbit
cards.concept: Rabbit in a red-team vest poking at a padded test rig, gaining a glowing safety-margin shield pip.

cards.name: Constitutional Clause
cards.concept: An illuminated 'constitution' scroll snapping a beam down onto a reckless big-Attack model; parchment + amethyst.

cards.name: Alignment Researcher
cards.concept: Rabbit researcher at a glowing alignment console, a guardrail wall behind, valuation heart mending (heal).

cards.name: Sandbox Containment
cards.concept: An enemy model frozen inside a translucent padded sandbox cube; caution tape; a drawn card slips out.

cards.name: Failover Cluster
cards.concept: A resilient layered wall-unit, redundant padded panels, Failover halo — mid-game fortress.

cards.name: Rapid Rollback
cards.concept: A big rewind/restore dial spinning back, valuation streaming back up, parchment glow + safety pips.

cards.name: Interpretability Lattice
cards.concept: A glowing translucent lattice/scaffold of neurons being read by probes; ongoing engine; amethyst grid.

cards.name: The Long-Horizon Plan
cards.concept: A vast horizon roadmap stretching to a distant sun; a sweep of safety-energy washing over a row of enemy models.

cards.name: Claudius the Considerate
cards.concept: Legendary towering padded rabbit-sage with a halo of caution tape and a constitution tome, fortress aura; gold trim.

cards.name: Pod Provisioner
cards.concept: A squat modular server-pod crawler, clean material-design, a guardrail panel, spinning up a +1 compute chip on sunset.

cards.name: Spin Up a TPU Pod
cards.concept: A TPU pod powering on — a glowing cyan chip lattice, compute bolts, a drawn card; ramp.

cards.name: Index Crawler
cards.concept: A many-legged search-crawler critter scanning a wall of index tiles, one tile glowing (scry/draw); guardrail.

cards.name: Search & Index
cards.concept: A giant search bar ingesting the web into a card stream; clean grid; draw engine.

cards.name: Glitch in the Stack
cards.concept: A clean server stack hit by an RGB-split datamosh bolt that fractures one enemy; cyan+magenta glitch tell.

cards.name: Bardo the Hallucinator
cards.concept: A big hallucinating model-creature smearing into a glitch double-image, eyes mismatched; overclock heat shimmer.

cards.name: TPU Megapod
cards.concept: A colossal stacked TPU megapod tower humming with cyan compute, +2 compute charges, modular grid.

cards.name: Sunset Protocol
cards.concept: A board-wide sunset wave decommissioning all models; a setting datacenter sun, fading silhouettes (AoE).

cards.name: Gemma Twins, the Open Release
cards.concept: Two identical open-release twin models, one stepping into a dashed Open-Source zone as a free copy.

cards.name: Gemini Ascendant, Frontier Titan
cards.concept: Legendary colossal twin-faced frontier titan rising over the racks, a wipe-beam sweeping enemy models; Glitch fracture on one edge; gold trim.

cards.name: Distil-Bot V3
cards.concept: A scrappy little origami/paper bot compressing a big model into a tiny cheap clone; discount spark; Ship It.

cards.name: Token Faucet
cards.concept: A neon faucet pouring out a school of tiny 1/1 token-fish; swarm; cheap-and-fast.

cards.name: Quantize
cards.concept: A hand of cards being bit-crushed/quantized smaller, cost numbers ticking down; pixel-step compression motif.

cards.name: Open-Weights Intern
cards.concept: An open-hoodie intern flinging open a weights repo, a card flying out (draw); flip-flops, scrappy.

cards.name: Fork the Repo
cards.concept: A git-fork split: one model duplicating along a branching path into an exact copy; teal branch lines.

cards.name: Mixture-of-Interns
cards.concept: A cluster of small interns merging into one bigger guardrail unit, growing +1/+1 per buddy; swarm-to-wall.

cards.name: Sparse Activation
cards.concept: A sparse neural grid lighting only a few nodes that surge a whole row of fish with +Attack arrows; Ship It.

cards.name: Whale-Class Cluster
cards.concept: A whale-shaped compute cluster Launch weapon gaining charges as fish swim past; deep-sea teal.

cards.name: Inference Cascade
cards.concept: A cascading waterfall of inference tokens crashing as a wave straight at an off-frame CEO; scales with the swarm.

cards.name: The Whale, Open-Sourced
cards.concept: Legendary breaching open-source whale spilling a flood of token-fish from open weights; deep teal; gold trim.

heroes.name: ClosedAI CEO — The Hype Showman
heroes.concept: Hoodie-to-blazer pivot, headset mic, gesturing at an invisible 'one more thing'.

heroes.name: Anthrabbit CEO — The Earnest Safety Researcher
heroes.concept: Rabbit motif, clipboard 'constitution', calm to a fault, a halo of caution tape.

heroes.name: Googlitch CEO — The Overextended Giant
heroes.concept: Too many tabs, a search bar for a mouth, occasional glitch-smear hallucination tell.

heroes.name: ShallowSeek CEO — The Scrappy Upstart
heroes.concept: Hoodie + flip-flops, a pet whale, ships fast and cheap.

skills.name: Hype Ping
skills.concept: A hype-arrow bolt pinging a target then sparking +Hype on a friendly.

skills.name: Realign
skills.concept: A mending valuation heart / safety shield re-aligning.

skills.name: Index & Scry
skills.concept: A crystal/lens scrying the top of the roadmap, one card drawn.

skills.name: Spin Up
skills.concept: A quick compute-spark spin-up dial, +1 temporary compute.

background.name: The Datacenter Colosseum
background.concept: Server-hall arena, two podiums, three depth planes, blinking LEDs, broadcast rim glow. Clickable hotspots: rack LED cascades, CEO quip bubbles, breakable open-source padlock (spills token-fish), broadcast on-air toggle, tower window-lighting, spinning fans, spotlight snap. Live telemetry ticker + crowd-hype counter.
